extDescription.message: Intercepts external URLs and asks which Firefox container to open them in.

whitelistDesc.message: Domains in this list will open without asking (in the default container).

rulesDesc.message: Domains with a remembered container. You can delete a rule to be asked again.

aboutDesc.message: Intercepts URLs opened from external applications and lets you choose which Firefox container they open in, keeping your digital identities separate.

interstitialQuestion.message: Which container do you want to open this link in?

noContainers.message: You have no containers. Install Multi-Account Containers or use “Open without container”.

whitelistInputLabel.message: Domain to add to the whitelist
